title: ficus laevigata subvar. reticulosa
intro: Ficus laevigata subvar. reticulosa, also known as the Retz's banyan, is a variety of the Ficus laevigata tree native to tropical Asia. The Retz's banyan has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as promoting wound healing and protecting against infections. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or tincture, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
